title: Lockless
tagline: Locked yourself out of Screen Time? Brute-force your own forgotten PIN out of an old iTunes backup.

title: startup-claude
tagline: Log in, watch a boot animation, and land in six terminals already running Claude — one per project.

title: term-grid
tagline: Twelve real terminals in a browser grid. Every cell is a live PTY, not a log — type into any of them.

title: file-warden
tagline: A janitor for Home, Desktop, and Downloads. Idle files get filed by type and month. Never deletes.

title: brain-sync
tagline: Turns the whole machine into one wikilinked Obsidian map — every tool, skill, agent, and repo a node.

title: webshot
tagline: Screenshot any URL or HTML file to PNG in one command. Won't hang on long-polling sites.

title: skillify
tagline: Point it at a script or repo and it becomes a permanent Claude skill. The 'now do this forever' button.

title: stack-doctor
tagline: One command, green/red lines on the whole AI stack. Catches silent breakage before it burns tokens.

title: shrink
tagline: Squeeze text before it hits an LLM. Heuristic for free, or --ai for a 2–5× semantic cut that keeps the facts.

title: morning-brief
tagline: A daily machine status text with no cloud and no MCP — so it still fires when everything else is down.
